```{r General setup and parameter preparation}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@PartnerReport")
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(yaml, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$ReferenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$ReferenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$ReferenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$ReferenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$ReferenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- NULL
}

typedParams <- list(
  ReferenceDataFile = params$ReferenceDataFile,
  UnitCodes = params$UnitCodes,
  ReportingPeriodFrom = if (!is.null(params$ReportingPeriodFrom)) as.Date(params$ReportingPeriodFrom) else NULL,
  ReportingPeriodTo = if (!is.null(params$ReportingPeriodTo)) as.Date(params$ReportingPeriodTo) else NULL,
  BirthWeightFrom = if (!is.null(params$BirthWeightFrom)) as.integer(params$BirthWeightFrom) else NULL,
  BirthWeightTo = if (!is.null(params$BirthWeightTo)) as.integer(params$BirthWeightTo) else NULL,
  GestationWeeksFrom = if (!is.null(params$GestationWeeksFrom)) as.integer(params$GestationWeeksFrom) else NULL,
  GestationWeeksTo = if (!is.null(params$GestationWeeksTo)) as.integer(params$GestationWeeksTo) else NULL,
  IncludeNonCorePatients = if (!is.null(params$IncludeNonCorePatients)) as.logical(params$GestationWeeksTo) else FALSE
)

data <- suppressWarnings(import_dhis2(
    dataset_options = dhis2_dataset_options(
      surveillance_end_from = typedParams$ReportingPeriodFrom,
      surveillance_end_to = typedParams$ReportingPeriodTo,
      birth_weight_from = typedParams$BirthWeightFrom,
      birth_weight_to = typedParams$BirthWeightTo,
      gestational_age_from = typedParams$GestationWeeksFrom,
      gestational_age_to = typedParams$GestationWeeksTo,
      include_ineligible_patients = typedParams$IncludeNonCorePatients,
      include_department = "yes")))

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

# temporary for development

#typedParams$UnitCodes <- c('DE_BER_CHARITE_CCM_NEO', 'DE_BER_CHARITE_CVK_NEO')
typedParams$UnitCodes <- 'DE_BER_CHARITE_CCM_NEO'
#typedParams$UnitCodes <- 'DE_BER_CHARITE_CVK_NEO'

reference_data <- data |>
  calculate_reference_data()

data_bkp <- data
reference_data_bkp <- reference_data

data$patients <- data$patients |>
  filter(
    department_key %in% (
      data$metadata$departments |>
        filter(code %in% typedParams$UnitCodes) |>
        pull(department_key)))

data <- neoipcr:::apply_postfilter(data)

```
